name: Mushroom Miso Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and slice the mushrooms.
2. Sauté mushrooms with balsamic vinegar in a large skillet until fully cooked. Remove mushrooms from the skillet and set aside, keeping the mushroom liquid in the skillet.
3. Add 3 cups water, miso, tamari, and nutritional yeast to the skillet. Whisk until thoroughly blended and simmer for a few minutes.
4. Add celery seed and black pepper to taste. Return the mushrooms to the skillet.
5. Mix together cornstarch and 1/4 cup water in a separate cup to ensure the cornstarch is fully dissolved.
6. Gradually add the cornstarch suspension to the gravy over medium heat, stirring continuously until the desired thickness is reached. Cook for an additional minute before serving immediately.
Note: If making ahead, prepare the miso-mushroom mixture without adding cornstarch. When ready to serve, reheat the mixture and thicken as needed.
Makes 4 cups. Nutritional info per 1/4 cup serving:
28 calories, 0.4 grams fat, 13.3% protein, 210 mg sodium.
